evals.prompt: 我第一次启动 mini-agent，先只想把大模型配置好，TOS 先不弄。
evals.expected_output: Guides the user through only the primary OpenAI-compatible model variables and doctor verification, without requiring TOS.

evals.prompt: 我要用火山的语音识别 API key 做会议录音转写，应该怎么配？
evals.expected_output: Provides Doubao ASR environment variables, explains API-key and app-key/access-key modes, and tells the user to verify [asr_path] in doctor.

evals.prompt: 本地视频太大，模型服务要公网 URL，帮我创建 TOS 并配置临时链接流程。
evals.expected_output: Guides private TOS bucket creation, least-privilege credentials, lifecycle cleanup, and short-lived pre-signed URL workflow while noting whether automatic upload is supported.
